summary:
Implementation plan for Project SpecOps.
- **Backend**: FastAPI serving CrewAI agents. Using WebSockets for real-time "thought" streaming.
- **Frontend**: Next.js to render the "War Room" (logs) and "Living Doc" (PRD).
- **Core Loop**: User Input -> Manager -> Strategist (Roast) -> Architect (Build) -> Manager (Check) -> Stream to UI.
